t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: FK to Dim_Position.PositionID. Distribution key -- co-located with Dim_Position for efficient JOINs.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: FK to Dim_Position.PositionID. Distribution key -- co-located with Dim_Position for efficient JOINs.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer ID who owns the position. Nullable (some system positions may not have CID).
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer ID who owns the position. Nullable (some system positions may not have CID).

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Exact timestamp when the position change occurred. Passthrough from etoro_History_PositionChangeLog.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Exact timestamp when the position change occurred. Passthrough from etoro_History_PositionChangeLog.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: ETL-computed YYYYMMDD int from Occurred. Clustered index key. Always filter on this for performance.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: ETL-computed YYYYMMDD int from Occurred. Clustered index key. Always filter on this for performance.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Position amount (USD) before this change. NOT NULL -- always captured.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Position amount (USD) before this change. NOT NULL -- always captured.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Change in amount (can be positive or negative). AmountChanged = NewAmount - PreviousAmount. NOT NULL.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Change in amount (can be positive or negative). AmountChanged = NewAmount - PreviousAmount. NOT NULL.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Position amount after this change. Nullable -- may be absent for non-amount change types.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Position amount after this change. Nullable -- may be absent for non-amount change types.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Stop-loss rate before this change. NOT NULL.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Stop-loss rate before this change. NOT NULL.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Stop-loss rate after this change. NOT NULL.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Stop-loss rate after this change. NOT NULL.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Unit count (shares/coins) before this change. Added for futures/unit-based positions.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Unit count (shares/coins) before this change. Added for futures/unit-based positions. DWH note: for ChangeTypeID=13, backfilled from UnitsOpenStartOfDay when NULL.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Additive DWH note about backfill logic; upstream text preserved verbatim

t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Unit count after this change. DWH note: for ChangeTypeID=13, backfilled from UnitsOpenStartOfDay when NULL.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Additive DWH note; upstream text preserved verbatim

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: FK to Trade.Instrument. Financial instrument being traded.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: FK to Trade.Instrument. Financial instrument being traded.

issues.problem: Tagged (Tier 4 — inferred) but is a direct passthrough from Dim_PositionChangeLog which has an upstream wiki. Per tier rules, passthrough with upstream wiki present must be Tier 1. The upstream's own Tier 4 classification should be noted in the description text, but the inheritance tier should be Tier 1.

Verbatim Tier 1 quote includes 'Distribution key -- co-located with Dim_Position for efficient JOINs' which is true for Dim_PositionChangeLog (HASH on PositionID) but false for this ROUND_ROBIN table. Creates a factual error in context despite correct Tier 1 inheritance.
Verbatim Tier 1 quote includes 'Clustered index key' which is true for Dim_PositionChangeLog but false for this HEAP table. Needs a DWH note to clarify the inherited statement does not apply here.

Tagged (Tier 5 — Expert Review) but these are passthroughs from Dim_PositionChangeLog. Strictly should be Tier 1 citing the upstream. However, Tier 5 is higher confidence so this does not degrade quality.
Empty row '| | |' between Synapse Index and UC Target is a minor formatting irregularity.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: No regeneration needed (PASS). For polish: (1) Re-tag ChangeTypeID as (Tier 1 — Dim_PositionChangeLog) with a note that upstream meanings are unverified. (2) Add DWH notes to PositionID and OccurredDateID clarifying that 'Distribution key' and 'Clustered index key' refer to the upstream table, not this ROUND_ROBIN HEAP table.

skipped_phases: P2/P3 checkbox not explicitly visible; footer says 11/14 phases
